title: Day 1: What is SEO?
content: Search Engine Optimization explained.
exercise: Search for a keyword and identify the top 3 'Organic' results vs 'Paid' results.

title: Day 2: How Search Engines Work
content: Crawling, Indexing, and Ranking.
exercise: Explain what a 'crawler' (like Googlebot) does in your own words.

title: Day 3: Keyword Research Basics
content: Finding what people search for.
exercise: Use a tool like Google Keyword Planner or AnswerThePublic to find 5 keywords for 'vegan recipes'.

title: Day 4: Short-tail vs Long-tail Keywords
content: Broad vs specific search queries.
exercise: Take a broad keyword like 'shoes' and find 3 long-tail variations.

title: Day 5: On-Page SEO: Title Tags
content: The first thing users and search engines see.
exercise: Write an optimized title tag for a blog post about 'Easy Yoga for Beginners'.

title: Day 6: Meta Descriptions
content: Increasing click-through rates from search results.
exercise: Write a compelling meta description for the same yoga blog post (max 160 chars).

title: Day 7: Heading Tags (H1-H6)
content: Structuring content for readability and SEO.
exercise: Outline a blog post with one H1 and at least three H2 headings.

title: Day 8: Image SEO
content: Alt text, file names, and compression.
exercise: Take an image and rename the file and create optimized alt text for it.

title: Day 9: URL Structure
content: Keeping it clean and descriptive.
exercise: Rewrite a messy URL (e.g., example.com/p?123) to be SEO-friendly.

title: Day 10: Content Quality & Relevance
content: Writing for users first.
exercise: Analyze a high-ranking article and note 3 things that make it helpful for the reader.

title: Day 11: Technical SEO: XML Sitemaps
content: Mapping your site for crawlers.
exercise: Find the sitemap of a website (usually example.com/sitemap.xml).

title: Day 12: Technical SEO: Robots.txt
content: Telling crawlers where not to go.
exercise: Explain why you might want to 'Disallow' certain pages from being indexed.

title: Day 13: Technical SEO: Page Speed
content: The impact of load time on ranking.
exercise: Test a website using Google PageSpeed Insights and identify one area for improvement.

title: Day 14: Mobile-First Indexing
content: Why mobile optimization is no longer optional.
exercise: Check a website on your phone and identify any usability issues (buttons too small, etc.).

title: Day 15: Off-Page SEO: Backlinks Basics
content: Building authority through others.
exercise: In your own words, explain the difference between a 'Do-follow' and 'No-follow' link.

title: Day 16: Link Building Strategies
content: Guest posting, outreach, and great content.
exercise: Draft an outreach email to a blog asking for a guest post opportunity.

title: Day 17: Local SEO Basics
content: Ranking for 'near me' searches.
exercise: Search for a local business and identify the key factors in their Google Business Profile.

title: Day 18: Google Search Console Intro
content: Monitoring your site's performance.
exercise: Research 3 pieces of information you can get from Google Search Console.

title: Day 19: Google Analytics Basics (GA4)
content: Understanding user behavior on your site.
exercise: Define what a 'Conversion' is in the context of Google Analytics.

title: Day 20: User Intent Match
content: Satisfying the user's goal (Informational, Navigational, Transactional).
exercise: Choose 3 keywords and identify the likely 'Intent' behind each.

title: Day 21: Schema Markup & Rich Snippets
content: Helping search engines understand your data.
exercise: Find a search result that has stars (rating) or a recipe preview and identify it as a rich snippet.

title: Day 22: Content Audit Basics
content: Updating and improving old content.
exercise: Pick an old blog post and identify 3 ways to make it more relevant today.

title: Day 23: Competitor Analysis
content: Learning from what works for others.
exercise: Identify the top 3 competitors for a fictional 'coffee subscription' brand.

title: Day 24: SEO for E-commerce
content: Optimizing product pages and categories.
exercise: Write an SEO-friendly product title and description for a pair of running shoes.

title: Day 25: Future of SEO: AI Search
content: How ChatGPT and Gemini are changing search.
exercise: Ask an AI a question and compare the answer to the top Google result.

title: Day 26: Building an SEO Strategy
content: Putting it all together into a plan.
exercise: Create a 3-month SEO roadmap for a new blog about 'Remote Work'.

title: Day 27: Measuring SEO ROI
content: Proving the value of your work.
exercise: Calculate the potential value of 1,000 visitors if your conversion rate is 2% and average order value is $50.

title: Day 28: SEO Ethics and 'Black Hat' SEO
content: What to avoid to keep your site safe.
exercise: List 3 'Black Hat' techniques and explain why they are risky.

title: Day 29: Final Project: The SEO Audit
content: Executing a full page audit.
exercise: Perform a complete On-page SEO audit for a single page of any website.

title: Day 30: Staying Current in SEO
content: Algorithm updates and industry news.
exercise: Follow 2 major SEO news sites (e.g., Search Engine Journal, Moz Blog).
